author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 more Tier-3s (Intel NIC libeth + iommufd UAPI):

- drivers/net/ethernet/intel-libeth.md: covers drivers/net/ethernet/intel/libeth/ — shared Intel-NIC library (NEW, post-2023): per-queue page-pool RX path with libeth_fq_create/_alloc/_recycle, NAPI-budgeted poll, generic XDP-DRV processing (XDP_TX/REDIRECT/PASS/DROP/ABORTED), AF_XDP zerocopy infrastructure (UMEM tx-ring + completion-ring + fill-ring + rx-ring), TX completion handling for skb-tx + xdp-tx + xsk-tx mixed workloads, per-pkt-type RSS hash + checksum descriptor parsing. Used by idpf, future ice migration. 10 REQ / 6 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (fqe-OOB + pp-UAF + xdp-buff-OOB + xsk-pool-UAF) / Layer-2 ref to page_pool.tla + napi_budget.tla + af_xdp_umem.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus alloc↔recycle round-trip.
- drivers/iommu/iommufd-main.md: covers iommufd/{main,driver,device}.c — modern /dev/iommu UAPI replacing legacy VFIO type1 container: per-fd Ctx with xarray object table, IOMMU_* ioctl dispatch (DESTROY + IOAS_ALLOC/MAP[2]/COPY/UNMAP/MAP_FILE/MAP_DMABUF/IOVA_RANGES/ALLOW_IOVAS + GET_HW_INFO + HWPT_ALLOC/INVALIDATE/GET_DIRTY_BITMAP/SET_DIRTY_TRACKING + VFIO_IOAS legacy compat + VIOMMU_ALLOC + VDEVICE_ALLOC + FAULT_QUEUE_ALLOC + OPTION), per-device bind/attach lifecycle, nested HWPT for guest IOMMU virtualization, per-IOAS dirty-page tracking for live migration, per-fd close walks objects in topological-sort order. 13 REQ / 8 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (object-UAF + id-uniqueness + iova-overflow + page-pin-leak) / Layer-2 ref to nested_invalidate.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus map↔unmap round-trip.

Total state: 250 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 16 Tier-3s. Foundation Tier-3 set: device-core + irqdesc + bpf-core + iommu-core + kvm-core + pci-probe + nvme-host-core + dma-swiotlb + usb-enumerate + kvm-tdp-mmu + qspinlock + drm-atomic + perf-event-core + scsi-mid-core + intel-libeth + iommufd-main.

Knowledge pages: design-drivers-net-ethernet-intel-libeth, design-drivers-iommu-iommufd-main.

Next iter plan: kernel/bpf/verifier.md (BPF static analyzer — biggest single component in kernel/bpf/) + drivers/vfio/pci-core.md (vfio-pci core driver — passthrough hot path).
